title: Insurance and Annuities Management: Deferred Compensation and Annuities
description: Conroe ISD allows employees to voluntarily set aside part of their paycheck into retirement savings accounts, such as annuities or deferred compensation plans, as an additional benefit of working for the district. The policy outlines how the district manages and oversees these optional savings programs for its staff. While this policy primarily affects district employees, it reflects the district's commitment to offering competitive benefits that help attract and retain qualified teachers and staff who serve students and families.
